description.ko: 고대 특이점 주위로 빛이 굴절되고, 공허의 침묵이 중력파로 속삭이는 우주의 가장 깊고 어두운 곳으로 떠나는 몰입형 여정입니다.
description.en: An immersive journey into the darkest reaches of the universe, where light bends around ancient singularities and the silence of the void speaks in gravitational waves.

prompt: A cinematic, hyper-realistic depiction of a vast cosmic void, swirling dark matter, distant nebulae in deep indigo and violet, a massive black hole at the center with a glowing accretion disk, stars being pulled into the gravity well, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting, sense of infinite scale.
